contradictions.exactDisagreement: CLM-AAV09-005 asserts fixed positive numeric romance polarity; CLM-AAV09-006 asserts fixed negative numeric romance polarity; CLM-AAV09-022 (Tân Biên §3.36 paraphrase) asserts mixed/context-dependent character without fixed fortune polarity.
contradictions.rationale: Partial review of Tân Biên §3.36 describes Đào Hoa with attraction/romance language and scandal/instability risk under combinations — neither fixed positive nor fixed negative. §4 does not list Đào Hoa among explicit annual Lưu động stars, so annual numeric scoring lacks school-manual authorization even before polarity is fixed.
contradictions.runtimeConsequence: No Lưu Đào Hoa fixed-polarity scoring rule may enter a V0.9 candidate shape. Interpretive-only / remain-disputed for numeric axes. Candidate shapes must exclude this identity.
contradictions.remainingUncertainty: Exact combination matrix (which co-present stars, palaces, or Tứ Hóa flips reading) is not fully extracted into a machine policy in this pass; only the refusal of fixed polarity is adjudicated.
